ksa_text: Conduct capacity planning and trend analysis for data infrastructure, including growth projection analysis, resource utilization trending, capacity requirement changes analysis, scaling recommendations, and strategic planning with partners.

dcwf.top_element_label: Conduct research, analysis, and correlation across a wide variety of all source data sets (indications and warnings).

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of planning systems and software

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies and procedures are in place to address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software and data and other supply chain issues.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-012 (OP, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4055 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.406, nist_ai_rmf=0.395, dcwf=0.394) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-T-012 excluded at composite 0.4055, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4055 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4055 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Survey Researcher. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4055 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-012 (OP, composite 0.4055) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4055 with signal across ddat=0.406, nist_ai_rmf=0.395, dcwf=0.394 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4055, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
